programs.title: The Last Thing She Said
programs.desc: A young woman befriends an elderly cleaning lady who works in her corporate office. However, their relationship soon turns uneasy, then dangerous, when she rejects a date request from the woman's awkward, middle-aged son.

programs.title: American Underdog
programs.desc: The inspirational true story of Kurt Warner, who overcomes years of challenges and setbacks to become a two-time NFL MVP, Super Bowl champion, and Hall of Fame quarterback. Just when his dreams seem all but out of reach, it's only with the support of his wife, Brenda, and the encouragement of his family, coaches and teammates that Warner perseveres and finds the strength to show the world the champion that he already is.

programs.title: Finally Caught
programs.desc: Gabby Petito's disappearance captivated the nation. Her social media posts left a trail, but what they uncovered was more troubling than anyone expected.

programs.title: One Way Mirror
programs.desc: Professional soldier Skylar Nemetz claims he has a momentary lapse in gun safety that lead to his wife Danielle's tragic death; authorities aren't buying that someone with his level of training could accidentally forget to do some basic gun care.

programs.title: One Way Mirror
programs.desc: Police finds a new mother murdered soon after reported missing; they bring her partner and his best friend in to be interrogated about her final night; not every interrogation method works with every suspect, and not every theory proves true.

programs.title: Heartland Homicide
programs.desc: On the outskirts of Nashville, Mich., Rodney Fancher's bullet-ridden body is found in a ditch; the hunt for a killer begins, pulling in police forces from across the state; as the case starts to turn cold, a startling confession emerges.
